Option C: This option marks 'in this school' as the error part. Option D: This option marks 'since five years' as the error part. **Option D** correctly applies: this part contains the error identified by the source answer key.

questions.question: Find the incorrect part of the sentence: He was senior than me in college.
questions.explanation: Option A: This option marks 'senior than' as the error part. Option B: This option marks 'No error' as the error part. Option C: This option marks 'me in college' as the error part. Option D: This option marks 'He was' as the error part. **Option A** correctly applies: this part contains the error identified by the source answer key.

questions.question: Identify the error in the sentence. By the time they arrive, the concert had ended.
questions.explanation: Option A: This option marks 'time' as the error part. Option B: This option marks 'arrive' as the error part. Option C: This option marks 'concert' as the error part. Option D: This option marks 'had ended' as the error part. **Option B** correctly applies: this part contains the error identified by the source answer key.

questions.question: Identify the word that doesn't fit the part of speech needed. She made a quickly decision without thinking.
questions.explanation: Option A: This option marks 'decision' as the error part. Option B: This option marks 'quickly' as the error part. Option C: This option marks 'made' as the error part. Option D: This option marks 'thinking' as the error part. **Option B** correctly applies: this part contains the error identified by the source answer key.
